Josh Inglis’ IPL 2026 U-Turn After ₹8.6 Crore Auction Shock

Dec 19, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Josh Inglis’ IPL Availability Takes Dramatic Turn in 2026 Auction

Josh Inglis went from being released over availability concerns to becoming one of the most expensive uncapped targets in the IPL 2026 auction after a ₹8.6 crore bid reshaped perceptions.
